---
title: "References"
description: "API references, configuration schemas, and lookup material for RenderBrains."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "title asc"
  fields: [title, description, date]
---

Technical reference documentation: API surfaces, configuration options, enumeration values, and lookup tables.

---

::: {.callout-note}
Reference docs are published from `vault/references/` via `make sync`. To contribute, create a note with `category: "references"` and `publish: true`.
:::
